title: Phase 15: Paste-to-Template and Relative-Demand Council
description: Implement deterministic workout text parser, demand comparison (easier/equivalent/harder), Council progression gating for swapped sessions, recovery load for harder sessions, and paste-review-save UI per docs/builds/bellbound_phase15_build_tasks.md. Sections A-H.
close_reason: Phase 15 complete: parser, demand comparison, Council integration, status effects, paste UI with AI fallback, all wired into App.tsx. 503 tests green.

title: Phase 14: Workout Swap and Same-Day Activity Choice
description: Implement KB-for-KB swap, off-block-on-training-day, and counter/quest correctness per docs/builds/bellbound_phase14_build_tasks.md. Sections A-G: Today screen choice UI, swap picker, guard counter tests, off-block entry from KB day, judgment reward via existing questProgress/statGain, offline persistence.
close_reason: Phase 14 complete: swap picker, off-block from KB day, counter tests, judgment reward — 453 tests green, pushed at 5435f64

title: Phase 7: App UI — DailyContext form + active effects display
description: Implement Phase 7 UI: DailyContextForm component (sleep/bodyweight/food inputs), active effects display on TodayScreen, wire into App.tsx (daily view, effectService call after workout save, effects state).
close_reason: Phase 7 complete: 159 engine + 112 app tests green, TypeScript clean, pushed

title: Phase 7: App data layer — repositories + services
description: Implement Phase 7 app data: dailyContextRepository (upsert/getByDate/listAfterDate), statusEffectRepository (add/listAll/deleteById), effectService (create effects from logs and sleep), councilService update to evaluate active effects and feed to council. TDD with fake-indexeddb.
close_reason: Phase 7 complete: 159 engine + 112 app tests green, TypeScript clean, pushed

title: Phase 7: Status effects system — engine pure logic
description: Implement pure engine logic for Phase 7: StatusEffect.createdDate field, effect creation from signals/sleep, isExpired per expiry type, Poor Sleep Goblin first-of expiry, multi-effect stacking resolver, Council slot 2 integration. TDD throughout.
close_reason: Phase 7 complete: 159 engine + 112 app tests green, TypeScript clean, pushed

title: Phase 1 Section A+C+E: UI shell, Today screen, Recent Logs
description: Create app/src/ui/ structure. TodayScreen renders seeded workout table (movements x rounds x load, rest). RecentLogs shows last 10 logs newest-first. App.tsx wires minimal navigation between views. LogForm.tsx captures status/rounds/difficulty/note and calls buildWorkoutLog+workoutLogRepository.add. Part of Phase 1 MVP.

title: Phase 1 Section D: buildWorkoutLog TDD
description: Implement pure function app/src/services/buildWorkoutLog.ts with test-first. Builds a WorkoutLog entity from LogFormInputs + WorkoutContext. Signals default all false. source=planned. structuredNotes.roundsCompleted set. Part of Phase 1 MVP.

title: Phase 1 Section B: todayService TDD
description: Implement app/src/services/todayService.ts with test-first. Covers getWeekday (pure), resolveTierWorkout (pure), and resolveToday (async, reads DB). Must have tests for KB day, rest day, free day, and tier resolution. Part of Phase 1 MVP.

title: Section I: Phase 0 done-when verification
description: Verify all Phase 0 done-when criteria. Most are programmatic checks (tests, engine dep audit, build). Three require browser: npm run dev + SW registration, seed visible in DevTools, manual backup download/import.
close_reason: All 9 criteria verified. 52 tests green, engine clean, build passes.

title: Section H: Backup foundation (export/import)
description: Implement app/src/data/backup/exportData.ts and importData.ts. Separate the pure serialize/deserialize step from the browser download/file-read trigger so the logic is unit-testable without DOM. TDD: write failing round-trip test first. Export reads all 7 tables into a single JSON object. Import writes them back (replace strategy). iOS WebKit evicts IDB after 7 days inactivity — backup is mandatory and built early.
close_reason: exportData.ts + importData.ts implemented with 10 tests, all green.

title: Section G: Seed data
description: Implement app/src/data/seed.ts. On first run (empty DB), seed: default character, default week template (Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri KB, Wed Rest, Sat Free, Sun Rest), active block (baselineTier:1, testGuardMinSessions:6, completedPlannedKbSessions:0), Double KB Strength workout template (tiers 1-3 = 4/5/6 rounds, 5 movements). Idempotent: re-seeding must not duplicate. TDD: failing tests first.
close_reason: seed.ts implemented with 7 tests, all green. Wired in main.tsx.

title: Section F: Repository mapping layer
description: Implement the repository layer in app/src/data/repositories/. One file per aggregate. Each repo maps between Dexie row types and engine entity types. Minimum functions: blockRepository.getActiveBlock(), workoutTemplateRepository.getById(id), weekTemplateRepository.getDefault(), workoutLogRepository.add(log), workoutLogRepository.listRecent(n). TDD: write failing round-trip test first for each function, then implement.
close_reason: All 5 minimum repo functions implemented with round-trip tests. 11 tests green.

title: Phase 0 Section A: Project scaffold and monorepo setup
description: Set up npm workspaces monorepo with packages/engine (pure TS) and app (Vite React PWA). Configure Vitest for engine tests and fake-indexeddb for data-layer tests. Verify npm run dev and npm test both pass.
close_reason: All Section A tasks complete. Monorepo scaffold, engine package, Vite PWA app, Vitest, and fake-indexeddb all wired up. npm test passes green across both packages.

title: UI aesthetic and visual system pass
description: Implement the visual system spec from docs/builds/bellbound_ui_aesthetic_spec.md. Two parts: (1) Convert hardcoded CSS color/type values to CSS custom properties in index.css so the palette is defined in one place. (2) Build ArtSlot component with slot-id-to-asset mapping and placeholder rendering; wire slots into TodayScreen (zone), CharacterView (character), and status effects display (status icons). No training logic changes.

title: Dexie schema — 7 tables, version 1 (Section E)
description: Create app/src/data/db/bellboundDb.ts as a Dexie subclass with 7 tables: characters (userId), blocks (id), weekTemplates (id), workoutTemplates (id), workoutLogs (id + date/blockId indexes), dailyContext (date), statusEffects (id). Define TypeScript row types in the data layer (no engine imports). Export a single db instance. TDD: failing schema test first via fake-indexeddb, then implement.
close_reason: 7-table Dexie schema with row types and 9 TDD schema tests, all green

title: Engine config constants (Section D)
description: Expand packages/engine/src/config.ts with SORENESS_EFFECT_DAYS constants. Currently the file is a placeholder with only TEST_GUARD_MIN_SESSIONS and SLEEP_OK_HOURS. Need to add SORENESS_EFFECT_DAYS object with breathlessFog: 3, squatTax: 3, gripCurse: 2 and a comment block noting these are the single source of truth. TDD: write failing test first, then implement. Engine index already re-exports config.
close_reason: SORENESS_EFFECT_DAYS added with as const, comment block, TDD green (14 engine tests)

title: Phase 0 Section C: engine domain entities
description: Define all pure TypeScript entity types in packages/engine/src/entities/. Write failing test first, then implement each entity to pass. Entities: enums, Character, Block, WeekTemplate, WorkoutTemplate, Signals, WorkoutLog, DailyContext, StatusEffect.
close_reason: All entity types defined, test-first. tsc and vitest green. 9 entity tests passing.

title: Phase 0 Section B: PWA shell setup
description: Install and configure vite-plugin-pwa for the Bellbound app. Verify service worker registers and app shell loads offline. No unit tests — browser verification only per TDD protocol.
close_reason: PWA shell complete: icons created, vite-plugin-pwa configured, browser verification steps documented in implementation trail.
